overview: A highly professional, visually stunning landing page for Meiosis Healthcare — an enterprise-grade EMR platform built for Indian clinics. Features dark/light mode toggle, comprehensive feature showcase covering keyboard-centric EMR, local-first privacy architecture, ABDM interoperability, AI-Scribe, and pricing tiers.
features: Dark/light mode toggle with persistent preference
Hero section with strong CTA redirecting to the Meiosis app
Feature grid covering EMR, privacy, ABDM, and clinical tools
Pricing section with Standard and Enterprise tiers
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Healthcare-appropriate color palette with OKLCH tokens
